title: California General Stock Corporation Incorporation (Articles of Incorporation, Form ARTS-GS)
description: Incorporate a general stock corporation in California by filing Articles of Incorporation (Form ARTS-GS) with the California Secretary of State, using the data model of the paper/PDF ARTS-GS form. Form ARTS-GS may only be used for a single class of authorized shares; a corporation needing a multiple-share-class structure must compose its own Articles of Incorporation (out of scope for this document). Covers the initial incorporation filing only: corporate name, business addresses, agent for service of process, authorized shares, and incorporator signature. Filing fee $100 (plus an optional $5 certified-copy fee); fastest channel is online at bizfileOnline.sos.ca.gov, which mirrors this same field set. It does not submit the filing; the live California Secretary of State source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md). Out of scope: bylaws (not filed with the state), the Statement of Information (a separate filing due within 90 days and annually thereafter, Form SI-550), and the federal EIN application (see us/irs/employer-identification-number-ss4). Pairs with us/ca/sos/business-entity-llc-formation, the LLC counterpart from the same authority.

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the Form ARTS-GS (Rev. 06/2023) PDF (all six numbered items read in full) and cross-checked against the ARTS-GS Instructions (Rev. 06/2019), which supplies the agent-for-service-of-process, authorized-shares, and signature rules not restated on the form itself. Not a time-versioned/edition form: Articles of Incorporation is a one-time initial filing, not filed 'for' a recurring period, so it is authored at the plain (non-edition) registry path per the GSP-0005 §2 coexistence test. Status remains 'draft' pending full independent field-by-field source review. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: corporationName
fields.label: Corporate Name
fields.description: The proposed corporation name exactly as it should appear on Secretary of State records. General corporate name requirements and restrictions apply (see the Secretary of State's name-availability guidance); a name reservation is not required to file this form.

fields.name: principalAddressLine1
fields.label: Initial street address of corporation
fields.description: Must be a physical street address; do not enter a P.O. box or an "in care of" address.

fields.name: principalAddressCity
fields.label: Corporation's initial address — city
fields.description: Do not abbreviate the city name.

fields.name: principalAddressState
fields.label: Corporation's initial address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation. Unlike item 3b (the individual agent's address, fixed to California), neither the form nor the ARTS-GS Instructions restrict the corporation's own initial address to California.

fields.name: principalAddressZipCode
fields.label: Corporation's initial address — ZIP code
fields.description: 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format, e.g. 95814 or 95814-1234.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Initial mailing address of corporation, if different from item 2a
fields.description: Optional; used for mailing purposes only. Unlike the corporation's initial street address, this may be a P.O. box or an "in care of" address.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing address — city
fields.description: Required when mailingAddressLine1 is given. Do not abbreviate the city name.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Mailing address — state
fields.description: Required when mailingAddressLine1 is given. Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: mailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: Mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required when mailingAddressLine1 is given. 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format.

fields.name: agentType
fields.label: Agent for service of process — type
fields.description: The corporation must name an agent for service of process: either an individual (an officer, director, or any other individual who resides in California with a physical California address) OR a registered corporate agent qualified with the Secretary of State — not both. A corporation cannot name itself as agent. If individual, also give agentFirstName/agentLastName/agentStreetAddressLine1/agentCity/agentState/agentZipCode. If corporation, also give agentCorporationName.

fields.name: agentFirstName
fields.label: California agent's first name (if agent is not a corporation)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when agentType is individual. The name and California street address of an individual agent is a public record.

fields.name: agentMiddleName
fields.label: California agent's middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: agentLastName
fields.label: California agent's last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when agentType is individual.

fields.name: agentSuffix
fields.label: California agent's suffix
fields.description: E.g. Jr., Sr., III.

fields.name: agentStreetAddressLine1
fields.label: California agent's street address (if agent is not a corporation)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when agentType is individual. Must be a physical California street address; do not enter a P.O. box or an "in care of" address.

fields.name: agentCity
fields.label: California agent's address — city
fields.description: Required when agentType is individual. Do not abbreviate the city name.

fields.name: agentState
fields.label: California agent's address — state
fields.description: Required when agentType is individual. Fixed to California: the form pre-prints "CA" in this field, since an individual agent for service of process must reside in California with a California address.

fields.name: agentZipCode
fields.label: California agent's address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required when agentType is individual. 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format.

fields.name: agentCorporationName
fields.label: California registered corporate agent's name (if agent is a corporation)
fields.description: Required when agentType is corporation. Enter the exact name as registered with the Secretary of State. Before designation, the corporation must have a current agent registration certificate on file under Corporations Code section 1505, and advance approval from that corporation must be obtained.

fields.name: authorizedShares
fields.label: Total number of shares the corporation is authorized to issue
fields.description: This form may be used only for a single class of authorized shares; a corporation needing a multiple-share-class structure must compose its own Articles of Incorporation instead of this form. Must not be left blank or entered as 0 — at least 1 share must be authorized, and any number may be authorized. Before shares are sold or issued, the corporation must separately comply with California securities law.

fields.name: incorporatorName
fields.label: Type or print name (incorporator signature block)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The printed name of an incorporator signing under the form's certification. Every incorporator must sign; do not include the signer's title. Only one Form ARTS-GS with one set of signatures may be filed; additional incorporators sign on an attached page (out of scope for this flat field set — see GSP-0009).
